name: Duplicate connection assignment to environment
description: TC-005-121: Adding the same connection to an environment twice must return an error

steps.name: second assignment of the same connection is rejected
REQUIRE: Request should complete without error
REQUIRE: Response should not be nil

parameters.name: Actual
